  "findings": [
    "Conductors installed in a wet location do not have the required wet-rated insulation type (e.g., missing the 'W' designation such as THWN, XHHW)."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Remove the non-compliant conductors and pull new conductors with insulation rated for wet locations (such as THWN or XHHW-2) in accordance with NEC 310."
  ],
  "rationale": "The installation of conductors without a wet-location rating in a wet location violates NEC requirements, posing a high risk of insulation degradation, short circuits, and shock hazards over time.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 310",
    "NEC Table 310.16",
    "NEC 310.10(C)"
  ]
}
